seoTitle: Mount Lambie vs Mount Lewis — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Lambie and Mount Lewis. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Lambie vs Mount Lewis: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Lambie and Mount Lewis.
heading: Mount Lambie vs Mount Lewis — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Lambie, New South Wales and Mount Lewis, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Lambie has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Mount Lewis (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Lambie or Mount Lewis safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Lambie has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Mount Lewis scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Lambie scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Lewis scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Lambie or Mount Lewis?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Lambie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
